title: scorodonia vulgaris
intro: Scorodonia vulgaris, also known as Wood Sorrel, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Oxalidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Wood Sorrel include its ability to help with digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. Wood Sorrel is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and is also used as a food ingredient, particularly in salads and as a garnish.
